class.name: ASEventTagData
class.description:
ASEventTagData contains all information needed to dispatch and track events in the Ability System. Includes event identification, participants, magnitude values, custom payload data, and timing information.
Key features: - Event identification through event_tag - Participant tracking (instigator and target) - Magnitude values for quantitative events - Custom payload for flexible data attachment - Timestamp and tick tracking for historical purposes - Node reference helpers for easy access
Used by ASComponent for event dispatching and by the historical system to track event occurrences for rollback and analysis.

method.name: get_instigator
method.description: Returns the instigator node, or null if not available.

method.name: get_target
method.description: Returns the target node, or null if not available.

method.name: set_instigator
method.description: Sets the instigator node (stores ObjectID internally).

method.name: set_target
method.description: Sets the target node (stores ObjectID internally).

method.name: to_dict
method.description: Converts the event data to a Dictionary for serialization.

method.name: from_dict
method.description: Loads event data from a Dictionary created by to_dict().

members.member: The event tag identifying this event type.
ObjectID of the node that triggered this event.
ObjectID of the node that is the target of this event.
Magnitude value for quantitative events (damage, healing, etc.).
Custom data payload for flexible event-specific information.
Timestamp when the event occurred (seconds since start).
Tick ID for multiplayer synchronization and rollback.
